requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — NS / IEC 62368-1-aligned, 230 V / 50 Hz, Plug Types C / D / M
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——NS / IEC 62368-1对齐，230 V / 50 Hz，插头类型C / D / M
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——NS / IEC 62368-1對齊，230 V / 50 Hz，插頭類型C / D / M

summary.en: Nepal operates at 230 V / 50 Hz. Plug Type D (Indian three-round-pin, BS 546) is most prevalent; Type C (Europlug, two-round-pin) is very widely used and compatible with Type D sockets; Type M (South African 15 A, large three-round-pin) is found in some older commercial and industrial installations. Electrical safety for IT and audio/video equipment follows Nepal Standards (NS) aligned with IEC 62368-1 (formerly IEC 60950-1). NBSM administers conformity assessment; test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are accepted within the NTA type-approval dossier. Products designed for Chinese domestic supply (220 V / 50 Hz) are close in voltage but Nepal nominal is 230 V; products must carry appropriate plug type and NS safety documentation for Nepal.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔使用230 V / 50 Hz供电。D型插头（印度三圆孔，BS 546）最为普遍；C型插头（欧洲两圆孔）广泛使用且与D型插座兼容；M型插头（南非15 A大三圆孔）见于部分旧式商业及工业装置。IT及音视频设备的电气安全遵循与IEC 62368-1（前身为IEC 60950-1）对齐的尼泊尔标准（NS）。NBSM负责合格评定；NTA型号核准文件范围内接受国际认可实验室出具的测试报告。为中国国内供电（220 V / 50 Hz）设计的产品电压接近，但尼泊尔额定电压为230 V；产品须配备适用于尼泊尔的插头类型并取得NS安全文件。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾使用230 V / 50 Hz供電。D型插頭（印度三圓孔，BS 546）最為普遍；C型插頭（歐洲兩圓孔）廣泛使用且與D型插座相容；M型插頭（南非15 A大三圓孔）見於部分舊式商業及工業裝置。IT及音視頻設備的電氣安全遵循與IEC 62368-1（前身為IEC 60950-1）對齊的尼泊爾標準（NS）。NBSM負責合格評定；NTA型號核准文件範圍內接受國際認可實驗室出具的測試報告。為中國國內供電（220 V / 50 Hz）設計的產品電壓接近，但尼泊爾額定電壓為230 V；產品須配備適用於尼泊爾的插頭類型並取得NS安全文件。

standards_or_laws: NS / IEC 62368-1 (aligned) — Audio/Video, IT and Communications Technology Equipment Safety (Nepal Standard)
Nepal Electricity Authority supply standard — 230 V / 50 Hz
Plug Type D (BS 546), Type C (CEE 7/16), Type M (BS 546 15 A)

summary.en: China uses GB 4943.1-2022 (IEC 62368-1-aligned) for electrical safety of IT and audio/video equipment, administered through CCC mandatory certification. China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz (slightly lower nominal voltage than Nepal's 230 V) and uses plug type I (GB 2099.1 / AS/NZS 3112 oblique three-flat-pin). CCC safety testing and GB 4943.1 are not accepted as equivalent by NBSM and do not substitute NS safety conformity for Nepal.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 4943.1-2022（与IEC 62368-1对齐）规范IT及音视频设备的电气安全，通过CCC强制认证实施。中国使用220 V / 50 Hz（比尼泊尔额定230 V略低）并采用I型插头（GB 2099.1 / AS/NZS 3112斜三扁销）。NBSM不承认CCC安全测试和GB 4943.1为等效标准，其不可替代尼泊尔NS安全合规。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 4943.1-2022（與IEC 62368-1對齊）規範IT及音視頻設備的電氣安全，通過CCC強制認證實施。中國使用220 V / 50 Hz（比尼泊爾額定230 V略低）並採用I型插頭（GB 2099.1 / AS/NZS 3112斜三扁銷）。NBSM不承認CCC安全測試和GB 4943.1為等效標準，其不可替代尼泊爾NS安全合規。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety scope
GB 2099.1 — Plug and socket standard (China type I)

gap.en: Near-compatible voltage (China 220 V vs. Nepal 230 V nominal; most products rated 100-240 V accommodate both), but plug type differs significantly (China: type I oblique three-flat-pin; Nepal: type D / C / M). CCC/GB 4943.1 safety certificates are not accepted by NBSM. Separate NS/IEC 62368-1-aligned safety testing and NBSM conformity documentation are required. Product labelling and plug configuration must be adapted to Nepal market norms.
gap.zh: 电压接近兼容（中国220 V与尼泊尔额定230 V；大多数标注100-240 V的产品可兼容），但插头类型差异显著（中国：I型斜三扁销；尼泊尔：D/C/M型）。NBSM不接受CCC/GB 4943.1安全证书。须另行进行符合NS/IEC 62368-1的安全测试并提交NBSM合格文件。产品标注和插头配置须适应尼泊尔市场规范。
gap.zht: 電壓接近相容（中國220 V與尼泊爾額定230 V；大多數標注100-240 V的產品可相容），但插頭類型差異顯著（中國：I型斜三扁銷；尼泊爾：D/C/M型）。NBSM不接受CCC/GB 4943.1安全證書。須另行進行符合NS/IEC 62368-1的安全測試並提交NBSM合格文件。產品標注和插頭配置須適應尼泊爾市場規範。

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NS/IEC 62368-1-aligned electrical safety testing is required for Nepal market entry, submitted within the NTA type-approval dossier. Voltage (230 V / 50 Hz) is close to Chinese domestic (220 V / 50 Hz) and most wide-range-rated products accommodate both; however, plug type (Nepal: D/C/M; China: I) and NS certification must be addressed separately. CCC/GB 4943.1 certification does not satisfy NBSM requirements. Obtain test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入尼泊尔市场须进行符合NS/IEC 62368-1的电气安全测试，并纳入NTA型号核准申请文件。电压（230 V / 50 Hz）与中国国内（220 V / 50 Hz）接近，大多数宽范围额定产品均可兼容；但插头类型（尼泊尔：D/C/M型；中国：I型）和NS认证须另行处理。CCC/GB 4943.1认证不满足NBSM要求。须从国际认可实验室取得测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入尼泊爾市場須進行符合NS/IEC 62368-1的電氣安全測試，並納入NTA型號核准申請文件。電壓（230 V / 50 Hz）與中國國內（220 V / 50 Hz）接近，大多數寬範圍額定產品均可相容；但插頭類型（尼泊爾：D/C/M型；中國：I型）和NS認證須另行處理。CCC/GB 4943.1認證不滿足NBSM要求。須從國際認可實驗室取得測試報告。
